description: `first :nums = 1` assigns to a reporter call, not a place, raising the runtime's own `ol-not-a-place` (issue #94, `stage: "runtime"` — this is the same defect the semantic checker's `checker-not-a-place.ts` rule from issue #113 also catches at `stage: "semantic"`, but `execute()` never runs `check()`). The structural check happens before any operand is evaluated, so `:nums` need not even be bound.
